ddls:
CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the director */,
  "movies_directed" INTEGER /* Number of movies directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "actor_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the actor */,
  "movies_featured_in" INTEGER /* Number of movies featured in by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Rating score given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who engaged with the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was engaged with */,
  "watch_time" REAL /* Total watch time of the movie by the user */,
  "num_times_watched" INTEGER /* Number of times the user watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being analyzed */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre being analyzed */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being analyzed */,
  "content_rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content rating being analyzed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the movie */,
  "total_watched_time" REAL /* Total watched time of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES content_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie cast record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor in the movie */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie crew record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award won */,
  "crew_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member who won the award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_crew_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_member_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)
